title: World Expand
description: Expand your world by completing advancments!
body:
Only 1 Advancement = More World!
🌍 The World Expand Challenge
Initially, your world is confined to a tiny area. Forget the vast landscapes you're used to—here, every step must be earned. As you complete advancements, the world borders dynamically expand, revealing new biomes, resources, and structures. Your ultimate goal? Complete every challenge to fully unlock the world and defeat the Ender Dragon!

🏆 Why Play World Expand?
If you find standard survival too easy or aimless, this plugin adds a layer of progression that makes every achievement feel rewarding. It turns Minecraft into a strategic survival experience where your progress is directly tied to your skill and curiosity. Perfect for players looking for a "progression-based" survival loop.
